name: I waited 3 weeks to report ladder fall because pain started late, too late?
description: Risky but possible with good cause.

mainEntity.name: I waited 3 weeks to report ladder fall because pain started late, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Risky but possible with good cause.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Maybe not, but risky**—Utah allows 180 days, Idaho 60; show good cause.[2]

Delayed symptoms common; doctor note explains.[3]

- Explain in writing.
- Strong medical proof.
- Appeal if denied.

Report now; don't delay more.
